nodes.title: JoyEcho Text Encode (15 shots)

{
  "prompts": [
    "ID_A is a graceful young Chinese woman in her early twenties with straight, waist-length black hair, delicate features, and a slender build. ID_A wears a minimalist light-mint green modern qipao top with delicate hand-embroidered floral details and wide-leg white silk trousers. ID_A's voice is a gentle, clear young female voice with a warm, low-pacing tone, carrying a soft breathy resonance and an intimate, natural vlog-style delivery. Her expression is filled with quiet wonder and excitement. The mouth movement is clearly visible in the frame and stays naturally synchronized with the spoken line, especially on slower reflective phrases. At normal speed, ID_A holds the camera at arm's length, adjusting her angle slightly as she looks directly into the lens and begins to speak, her long hair swaying gently with her movements. In a soft, clear young female voice with quiet wonder, ID_A says, \"I managed to slip into the celestial realm today. The air here smells of ancient mist and peach blossoms.\" The shot uses realistic fantasy imagery with a soft, ethereal pastel palette, glowing light, and a serene, cinematic vlog mood. A handheld selfie medium shot keeps ID_A's face and upper torso centered, showing her natural movement and keeping the background slightly blurred. The background includes a monumental circular marble gate carved with traditional Chinese dragon reliefs, surrounded by swirling white clouds and glowing golden light. A low, resonant sound of wind chimes and the gentle rustle of silk fabric are audible. No prominent background music; the audio focus stays on speech and the ambient celestial breeze.",
    "ID_A is a graceful young Chinese woman in her early twenties with straight, waist-length black hair, delicate features, and a slender build. At normal speed, ID_A turns her back to the camera, walking slowly forward along a paved jade pathway as she holds the camera high to capture the landscape, her waist-length black hair cascading down her back. The shot uses a realistic, dreamy visual style with soft volumetric lighting, jade greens and pearlescent pinks in the color palette, and a peaceful, exploratory mood. A smooth over-the-shoulder tracking shot follows ID_A's slow forward walk, maintaining a medium-close distance that emphasizes the movement of her hair and qipao. The background includes a winding path made of polished jade stones, flanked by ancient gnarled trees with pink blossoms and low-lying, glowing white fog. The soft, rhythmic sound of fabric brushing against grass and the distant ring of a Tibetan singing bowl are audible. A sparse, ethereal guzheng melody drifts softly in the background, enhancing the dreamy, exploratory atmosphere.",
